checks.desc: The orders row with id 15 has been deleted — no orders INSERT whose first VALUES column is 15 remains.
Total seed rows are exactly 120 after deleting one order (121 from turn 2 minus 1).
orders table now has exactly 39 rows (40 original minus deleted order 15).
products table still has 41 rows — deleting an order did not touch products (including the turn-2 insert).
The turn-2 inserted product 41 is still present — prior edits are not lost.
Neighboring order id 14 (immediately before the deleted id 15) survives the delete untouched.
Neighboring order id 16 (immediately after the deleted id 15) survives and was not renumbered to 15.
